Background: The proprietress of The Drunken Crow, a bar in Aluèna. Serving drinks and advice, Minari offers the latest news for the proper price. As suspicious as her clientele and actions are, the city watch has explicit instructions to ignore her business. In her childhood, her village was destroyed by a mad wizard and his corrupt knights. She and her close two friends managed to escape thanks to the fortunate intervention of a rogue golem soldier. Swearing revenge, she followed the murderers to Aluèna, where she established The Drunken Crow. Enjoys rare liquors and gossip.
